Aiken’s house or Ryan’s house??? MAKE A VOTE!!! If you're interested to find out more about the furnitures & design of my home, refer to this link for all the promo codes & deals: http://bit.ly/aikenrenodeals 

R&R is giving an exclusive promotion for all NOC fans!

Receive a *DYSON Pure Cool Fan TP01* when you sign a renovation contract with them. Visit www.reztnrelax.com or WhatsApp 9721 5338 and *Quote “ILOVEAIKEN” upon fixing an appointment.

*T&Cs: Renovation contract should be valued at $30,000 and above to be entitled for the promotion. 

+PLUS

Stand a Chance to WIN *FREE Kitchen Makeover** (worth $10,000) here https://bit.ly/freekitchenmakeover
All you have to do is:
√ Follow @reztrelax Instagram and Facebook
√ Comment “ILOVEAIKEN” on the post and tag two friends!

*BONUS*: Additional chances will be given if you sign a renovation contract with them. Every $1,000 spent will be entitled 1 chance. ONE winner will be picked on 30th June 2021. Kitchen makeover is up to 20ft only. Other T&CS apply.

snippet.title: Prince Harry, Meghan reveal struggles behind royal rift in Oprah interview
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan Markle's revealing interview with Oprah Winfrey outlined their motivations for breaking from the Royal Family, including Meghan’s suicidal thoughts. 

#HarryandMeghan
#Oprah
#BuckinghamPalace

Watch The National live on YouTube Sunday-Friday at 9 p.m. ET

The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. Forever classic, yet supremely innovative, Bruno continues to redefine music, style, and popular culture, pushing the boundaries of pop, R&B, funk, soul, hip-hop, and dance, and remains as influential as ever.

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and Harry’s Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines won’t be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs

snippet.title: Liverpool 0-1 Chelsea | Mason Mount Strike Extends Unbeaten Run | Premier League Highlights
snippet.description:
The Blues move back into the top four as the unbeaten run under Thomas Tuchel reaches double figures, his team taking a big three points against the side managed by his compatriot Jurgen Klopp.

Download Chelsea FC's official mobile app:
-App Store https://apple.co/2vvlN9t
-Play Store http://bit.ly/2MfNJHX

Welcome to the official home of Chelsea Football Club on YouTube. It’s the only channel where you’ll get an authentic look at life at this great club. Every week we’ll be uploading fresh content from the training ground, our famous stadium and much, much more. Nowhere else will you get closer to world-class stars like Christian Pulisic, Kai Havertz, Hakim Ziyech, Timo Werner, N’Golo Kanté, Sam Kerr, Fran Kirby & Pernille Harder.

ABOUT CHELSEA FOOTBALL CLUB
Founded in 1905, Chelsea Football Club has a rich history, with its many successes including 5 Premier League titles, 8 FA Cups and 1 Champions League, secured on a memorable night in 2012. Famous former Blues include Peter Osgood, Gianfranco Zola, Frank Lampard, John Terry, Didier Drogba & Eden Hazard.

It's Monday 8 March 2021. Our top stories this morning 0:00

The Duke and Duchess of Sussex's much-anticipated interview with Oprah Winfrey has aired in the US - with the couple sharing their side of the story about life in the Royal Family.

The couple spoke about their relationships with other royals, racism and how their mental health suffered.

Meghan spoke with Oprah for most of the interview, before being joined by Prince Harry.

Get the full story 👉 http://bbc.in/3rqBdH3

After the teasing clips, the full interview between the Duke and Duchess of Sussex and Oprah Winfrey was shown last night in the US. Oprah with Meghan and Harry: A Primetime Special, is produced by Harpo Productions

Follow the story 👉 https://bbc.in/3bnQe6D

snippet.title: iKON - ‘왜왜왜 (Why Why Why)’ M/V
snippet.description:
왜왜왜 (Why Why Why)

사람에서 사랑으로
인연에서 연인으로
이별 없이 영원할 줄 알았는데
 
사실 아직도 거짓말 같죠 
활짝 웃으며 올 것만 같죠
아름다웠던 모습 그대로 

이제 와서야 후회만 해요
웃는 게 이쁜 그댈 울리기만 했죠
내가 바란 건 이게 아닌데

결국 이 지경 이 꼴이지 나란 놈
지켜주지도 못했지 너란 꽃
빨갛게 불타오르던 우리 모든 게 
하얗게 재만 남았죠 

사람에서 사랑으로
인연에서 연인으로
아름다운 사랑 꽃을 피웠는데

꽃을 피웠는데

웃음은 왜 울음이 돼
님에서 남이 돼버린 그대
이별 없이 영원할 줄 알았는데
우린 왜 왜 왜

내 꿈속에서도 멀어지는 너
아무것도 난 할 수가 없죠
멈춰보려 소리쳐도
눈을 뜨면 사라지죠
왜 네가 있을 때 잘해야 했던 걸
그때 난 몰랐을까
왜 모든 것들을 잃고 난 후에
소중함을 알게 될까

결국 이 지경 이 꼴이지 나란 놈
지켜주지도 못했지 너란 꽃
빨갛게 불타오르던 우리 모든 게
하얗게 재만 남았죠

사람에서 사랑으로
인연에서 연인으로
아름다운 사랑 꽃을 피웠는데

꽃을 피웠는데

웃음은 왜 울음이 돼
님에서 남이 돼버린 그대
이별 없이 영원할 줄 알았는데
우린 왜 왜 왜

그때 마지막인 줄 알았다면 조금 더
네 모습을 담아뒀을 텐데

단 한 번도 사랑하지 않은 적 없죠
처음부터 지금까지도

snippet.title: 娛樂新聞台 ｜ 演藝泰斗｜吳孟達｜設靈｜周星馳｜劉德華｜吳君如
snippet.description:
【娛樂新聞台】演藝泰斗吳孟達設靈

演藝泰斗吳孟達離開我們了！今日達哥家人為佢設靈，眾多達哥嘅好人都送上花牌致哀，包括有古天樂、劉德華、黎明、張學友、郭富城、小美、周潤發夫婦同埋成龍等等。而周星馳下午四點左右到靈堂致祭，逗留了九分鐘就離開。另外，劉德華、吳君如亦有現身靈堂致哀，君如亦有接受訪問分享同
達哥嘅往事。達哥嘅細佬亦交待達哥嘅骨灰會交俾家人帶番馬來西亞。

#娛樂新聞台 #吳孟達 #設靈 #達哥 #周星馳

snippet.title: Meghan Markle Says Kate Middleton Made Her Cry Before Wedding
snippet.description:
Meghan Markle is setting the record straight. The former “Suits” star spoke with Oprah Winfrey during a bombshell tell-all on CBS, where she addressed a past rumor that she made Kate Middleton cry prior to her wedding to Prince Harry. She said the situation was actually the opposite, and that it was actually Kate who made her cry and that her sister-in-law ended up apologizing.

snippet.title: Don't Put Me In Jail: How Young Offenders Become Probationers | Inside The Probation Service | Ep 1
snippet.description:
These youths have broken the law and would be placed behind bars, unless they are put on probation. Why do they deserve a second chance? We follow Singapore’s probation officers as they pry into the lives of the youth offenders, to evaluate if these minors are suitable for a community-based rehabilitation without risking public safety.

Continue watching Inside The Probation Service: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLkMf14VQEvTZZNr3smHeEo5zktcu9dB_E

=======
About Inside The Probation Service: Understand what leads youths to go astray and how to bring them back on track, in this unprecedented observational documentary that pries into the inner workings of Singapore's probation service.

snippet.title: 这部高分美食剧，却被人当成励志剧来看，看完果然信心大增，饭量也大增
snippet.description:
三星营养午餐大合集。
心胸狭窄，路越走越窄，胸襟坦荡，天越来越亮。
宅心仁厚才有福报深厚，阴险狡诈只会越混越差。
对每条朝你狂吠的狗扔石头，你永远也到不了目的地。
有时候忍了不丢人，能一笑置之的都是神。
大事不屑一顾，小事耿耿于怀。
不是在仇恨中死去，就是在痛苦中徘徊，
放下屠刀，立地成佛，卸下沙袋，快乐生活。

三星营养午餐大合集。
心胸狭窄，路越走越窄，胸襟坦荡，天越来越亮。
宅心仁厚才有福报深厚，阴险狡诈只会越混越差。
对每条朝你狂吠的狗扔石头，你永远也到不了目的地。
有时候忍了不丢人，能一笑置之的都是神。
大事不屑一顾，小事耿耿于怀。
不是在仇恨中死去，就是在痛苦中徘徊，
放下屠刀，立地成佛，卸下沙袋，快乐生活。

snippet.title: Cast of Vincenzo plays Mafia Game [ENG SUB]
snippet.description:

id.title: Pemeran Vincenzo bermain Permainan Mafia [INDO SUB]
id.description: Sepertinya menjadi mafia bukan berarti akan jago bermain Permainan Mafia 😂 para bintang VINCENZO Song Joong-ki, Jeon Yeo-been, dan Ok Taec-yeon berusaha mendatarkan ekspresi untuk menipu satu sama lain demi beberapa kekerenan Netflix yang eksklusif. Para pengacara bermain untuk diri mereka sendiri!

zh-Hans.title: 黑道律師文森佐的主演們玩黑道遊戲 【中字】
zh-Hans.description: 看來身為黑道中人並不意味著你在黑道遊戲中擁有優勢 😂 黑道律師文森佐的主演們宋仲基、全汝彬和玉澤演戴上最佳的撲克臉，試著智胜彼此以贏取獨家的Netflix禮品。每名律師都為了自己！

th.title: นักแสดงจาก Vincenzo เล่นเกมมาเฟีย [ซับไทย]
th.description: ดูเหมือนว่าการเป็นส่วนหนึ่งขององค์กรมาเฟียไม่ได้แปลว่าคุณจะได้เปรียบในเกมมาเฟีย😂 นักแสดงจาก VINCENZO ซงจุงกิ จอนยอบิน และอ๊คแทคยอน ทำหน้าตายเต็มที่ในขณะที่พวกเขาพยายามเอาชนะ ชิงไหวชิงพริบกันเพื่อรับรางวัลพิเศษจาก Netflix ตัวใครตัวมันงานนี้!

ja.title: 「ヴィンチェンツォ」のキャストがマフィアゲームに挑戦する [日本語字幕付き]
ja.description: マフィアの一部だとしてもマフィアゲームに強いわけでもなさそう😂「ヴィンチェンツォ」のキャストのソン・ジュンギ、チョン・ヨビンとオク・テギョンの3人が彼らは独占のネットフリックスコンテンツを得るために、ポーカーフェイスを整え、お互いを知恵でだし抜けてみる。弁護士でも自分のことだけで精一杯ですね！

snippet.title: Karnan | Kandaa Vara Sollunga Lyric Video Song | Dhanush | Mari Selvaraj | Santhosh Narayanan
snippet.description:
#Karnan | #KandaaVaraSollunga Lyric Video Song | #Dhanush | #MariSelvaraj | #SanthoshNarayanan | #KalaipuliSThanu | #VCreations

Song: Kandaa Vara Sollunga
Vocals: Kidakkuzhi Mariyammal, Santhosh Narayanan
Lyrics: Mari Selvaraj
Composed by Santhosh Narayanan

Special thanks to Thekkambatti S Sundarrajan, Ramji Audios - Madurai
Recorded by Santhosh Narayanan, Sai Shravanam, R K Sundar
Recording Assistants : Pranav Muniraj, NSR Sukumar
Recorded at Future Tense Studios, Prism Sound Studios, Resound India
Tapes: ‘4 Idiots’ group
Pappambadi Periya Melam Jama Munusami Kuzhu
Arranged, Programmed by Santhosh Narayanan
‘Geoshred’ Sarangi: Navneeth Sundar
Mixed and Mastered by Sai Shravanam at Future Tense Studios
Musicians Coordinator: Meenakshi Santhosh
Karnan Chants Chorus : Arivu, Yogi Sekar, Kottur Victor, Kalyanaraman, Purushothaman,
Pranav Muniraj, Deva A, ‘Pei’ Vijay S, Sathya Thamizharasan, Karthik Raja Karuppusamy

#Karnan Tamil Movie:
Star Cast : Dhanush , Lal , Yogi Babu , Nataraj (Natty ), Rajisha Vijayan
Director : Mari Selvaraj
Music Composer: Santhosh Narayanan
Producer: Kalaipuli S Thanu
Banner: V Creations
Director Of Photography: Theni Eshwar
Editor: Selva RK
Art Director : Tha Ramalingam
Action Choreography: Dhilip Subbarayan 
Dance Choreography: Sandy
Sound Design : Suren G – S Alagiakoothan
DI Colorist : Prasad and Babu
DI Line Producer: Krishna Rao V
Stills: Amir
Make up : Nellai V Shanmugam – R Raja
Costume : Perumal Selvam
Publicity Design : Kabilan Chellaih
Production Executive: Venkat Arumugam
PRO: Riaz K Ahmed – Diamond Babu

Lyrics animated by - SFTS MEDIA

Lyrics:

Not fathered by the Sun God; 
Nor witnessed by the Moon God; 
Born to a forsaken woman, this child - 
Fed and raised on famine, this child...

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

There's the big old Banyan Tree;
Perched upon its tallest branch, 
Though it is all alone -
The lone parakeet sings his name!

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

All these countless temples in the village, 
All these countless Gods in the temple, 
And not a single idol of Karnan - 
But he's part of our family! 

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Never laid eyes on any armour (Kavacham);
Never adorned with any ornaments (Kundalam), either;
Would you look how he wields the sword! 
None of his foes survived.

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Audio Label: Think Music

© 2021 SPI Music Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: 2021年才剛過2個月，就有5位港臺名人不幸離世，太讓人惋惜#吳孟達 #李香琴 #JUST娛樂
snippet.description:
#吳孟達 #李香琴 #JUST娛樂
希望看到這個影片的你，好好地活著，健康的生活。

歡迎觀看更多精彩視頻：
歌後高勝美農村走穴太落魄，被公司騙走幾千萬，一條裙子穿幾十年，落魄的鳳凰不如雞https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oWKD_4fXe74

與梁朝偉假戲真做遭封殺，湯唯犧牲的遠比鏡頭多，落魄後遠走他鄉，重啟人生https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6kc2DoZ8jV8

富豪丈夫消失30年，小甜甜龔如心爭產內幕遭曝光，獲千億家產後患癌去世https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=664aTVpuAe4

20歲冒充豪門成明星，27歲嫁百億豪門，3年生3子繼承家產太好命https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U8nDDTT2R9Q

曾志偉被楊受成暴打，隱瞞20年，真相曝光後大家都說活該https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9nQqBX6ir5U

《陀槍師姐》滕麗名連遭三男劈腿，終嫁富商成闊太讓人羨，前男友魏駿傑被戴綠帽太報應https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yv7C0QGj9Qc

他是賭王最倒楣女婿，妻子何超鳳成接班人，他卻被掃地出門一分未得https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MT4BmhJnY2E

向周星馳討要7千萬不成，于文鳳突嫁大16歲富豪，被嘲拜金女，連老伯也不放過https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Y8fGXsW7uf0

陳法拉官宣生女太突然，被豪門藏五年後拋棄原因曝光，今二婚嫁外籍老公逆風翻盤https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3Yt1gpClgE8

結婚70年守活寡50年，丈夫常年住酒店不回家，豪門闊太表面光鮮實際太心酸https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zTuYQPYOhl8

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Victory at King Power Stadium! | Leicester City vs Arsenal (1-3) | Premier League
snippet.description:
Watch the best of the match action as David Luiz, Alexandre Lacazette and Nicolas Pepe all got themselves on the scoresheet in an enjoyable 3-1 win over Leicester. 

#arsenal #arsenalhighlights #premierleague

---

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Mesut Ozil, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

Subscribe to the Official Arsenal YouTube Channel: https://arsn.al/youtube
Follow us on Facebook: https://arsn.al/facebook
Follow us on Twitter: https://arsn.al/twitter
Follow us on Instagram: https://arsn.al/instagram
Follow us on TikTok: https://arsn.al/tiktok

This is the Official YouTube channel for Arsenal Football Club.

For more match action, highlights and training videos, make sure you become a digital member and sign up to Arsenal Player. It's FREE and is the Home of the Game: https://arsn.al/arsenalplayer

Arsenal Football Club were formed in 1886 and amassed 13 League titles, 14 FA Cups. Some of their greatest players include: Thierry Henry, Dennis Bergkamp, Tony Adams, Ian Wright, Robert Pires, Liam Brady, Patrick Vieira, Cliff Bastin and Charlie George.

snippet.title: Persembahan: Amyza Aznan & Adrian - Ku Bersuara | Famili Duo (2021)
snippet.description:
Minggu keempat membawa ibu bapa dan anak ke pentas Famili Duo untuk menghiburkan penonton. Lima pasangan yang diketengahkan adalah Liza Abdullah & Naffiz Zolkefli, Amelina & Puteri, Shajiry & Hafiz, Amyza Aznan & Adrian dan Fauzi Nawawi & Fareez Fauzi. Nyanyian mereka akan diadili panel juri yang terdiri daripada Mark Adam dan Didie Alias.

Saksikan Famili Duo di TV3 setiap Ahad jam 9 malam. Anda juga boleh strim langsung di saluran YouTube TV3Malaysia.

Famili Duo merupakan rancangan hiburan terbaharu TV3. Seramai 40 pasangan selebriti popular tanahair akan bergandingan dengan ahli keluarga mereka untuk menonjolkan bakat nyanyian masing-masing.

Setiap minggu, 5 pasangan selebriti popular yang mempunyai hubungan kekeluargaan akan bertanding. Mereka perlu melengkapkan 2 pusingan iaitu satu 'cover song' dan satu nyanyian di pentas. Untuk pusingan pertama, ahli keluarga yang lebih berumur akan menentukan ‘cover song’ untuk dihasilkan menjadi video muzik. Lagu tersebut akan diberi nafas baharu dan dirakamkan di studio. Di pusingan kedua, ahli keluarga yang lebih muda berpeluang memilih lagu untuk dipersembahkan di atas pentas.

Pemarkahan ditentukan sepenuhnya oleh juri dan juara mingguan bakal membawa pulang hadiah wang tunai. Famili Duo dihoskan oleh Uyaina Arshad.

snippet.title: Guys React To Girls’ ‘Icks’ About Them | ZULA Perspectives | EP 25
snippet.description:
“You think you wear running shoes you can run away from police?”

In this episode of ZULA Perspectives, we introduce Hafeez, John, Maverick, and Mandon to a few of the most popular ‘icks’ Singaporean girls have about guys. From 'immigration face’ to earthquake leg shaking, what will the boys think about these irrational pink flags? Stay tuned to see if you share any of these ‘icks’!

snippet.title: EP22 预告 Trailer 甜晕！侯爷装醉留宿想亲十一娘，老夫人终于开窍替十一娘说话【锦心似玉 The Sword and The Brocade】
snippet.description:
▶02月28日首播，每周三四五晚20点更新两集
▶主演：  钟汉良、谭松韵、何泓姗、唐晓天
☞立即观看全集☞http://bit.ly/37B7eE7

《锦心似玉》明朝年间，庶女罗十一娘虽地位卑微却极有主见，认为女子眼光不应局限于内宅格局，她希望能凭靠精湛的刺绣技艺争取所向往的自由人生。意外嫁给永平侯大将军徐令宜后，她用乐观积极的心态对待身边的每一个人，依靠努力收获徐家上下的信任，重新执掌中馈。徐令宜被十一娘的种种美好品性而吸引，继而为之动心。两人几经周折情愫暗生，先婚后爱相知相许。在丈夫的支持下，十一娘开绣坊仙绫阁，努力传承刺绣技艺。而永平侯徐令宜，为维护家国安宁，改善民生，力挺开放海禁，经历重重困难。在徐家面临抄家灭族的滔天巨祸之时，夫妻齐心合力化解危局，成功护徐氏一族周全，最终促成开放海禁，至此海上贸易繁荣昌盛，沿海百姓安居乐业。夫妻二人情投意合，相信彼此，坚持所爱，一起面对人生风雨，书写了属于他们的传奇人生。

snippet.title: My Star Bride 过江新娘 EP20 (FINALE 大结局)
snippet.description:
Fang Cao worries about her mother's hospitalisation and decides to return to Vietnam to take care of her. Shi Jie buys a plane ticket for her leaving in two days. His condition relapses so he is hospitalised, worrying her. She confesses to him in front of his sickbed. Not wanting to burden her, he rejects her and asks her to sign the divorce papers to cut all ties with her. Fang Cao leaves sadly. 

芳草得知母亲入院，忧心如焚，决定回越南照顾她。世杰帮芳草买了机票，让她两天后就回去。世杰病发入院，芳草担心，在病榻前向他表白。但世杰不愿拖累芳草，断然拒绝，还要她签下离婚协议书，与她划清界限，芳草伤心离开……。

#MyStarBride #过江新娘
-- --

《乘风破浪的姐姐》是芒果TV推出的女团成长综艺节目，与其他女团选秀不同，该节目召集了30位1990年之前出生的女艺人，并最终选出7位成员组成女团。在第二季节目中，大众评审按照年龄分为30+和30-两大阵营。赛制上也变得更加残酷，初舞台表演要有Vocal（唱）和Dance（跳）两项，两项分开表演且缺一不可。节目焦点从女性的精彩绽放渗透到她们成功背后付出的努力和奋斗，表现出丰富多样化的女性价值观，诠释自信奋斗的“她力量”，让更多女性能从中感受到自我价值的体现。

snippet.title: Meghan Markle Reveals Kate Middleton Made Her CRY Ahead of Wedding
snippet.description:
Meghan Markle sets the record straight on rumors that she made Kate Middleton cry during Sunday’s ‘Oprah With Meghan and Harry: A CBS Primetime Special.’ The Duchess of Sussex says that it was actually the reverse and that Middleton apologized and sent her flowers. Markle also told Winfrey about why she didn’t feel protected by the royal institution.

snippet.title: 賽馬直播｜2021-03-07 競馬Fact Check Live直播10場HKJC香港賽馬會沙田泥草日馬 即場貼士 AI模擬賽果 排隊馬 | 蘋果日報 Apple Daily
snippet.description:
是日（7日）沙田馬場上演十場泥草賽事，頭場定於下午1時正開跑。

蘋果《競馬Fact Check》屆時直播各場賽事，讓馬迷猶如置身場內睇跑馬。

蔡約翰田戰正值十連勝旺勢，另外徒弟羅富全亦已連贏四期田戰，二人今次繼續派出不少實力馬上陣，有權延續沙田勝纜。

《競馬Fact Check》今季新增AI模擬賽果，集各項data進行運算，識別出哪些是機會馬，以得分高低排序，一目了然！

主持亦會即場解答讀者留言，與讀者互動交流；另外會加插騎練賽前訪問，大家或者從中可以搵到方向。

此外，將有出閘預測走位圖，等觀眾了解今場賽事形勢，邊啲馬可以賺步速；邊啲馬相對蝕底，務求幫大家捉更多冷馬。

《競馬Fact Check》設有參賽馬賠率走勢，由隔晚到即場，一目了然；電腦預計臨場大戶落飛馬，讓馬迷落注前作參考，增添勝算。

《競馬Fact Check》將於中午12時25分開播，屆時Youtube及《果燃台》會全程直播。

蘋果日報 ： http://hk.apple.nextmedia.com
即 like 蘋果 fb  ： http://www.facebook.com/hk.nextmedia

Android App ： http://bit.ly/AppleDailyApp-Android

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) – our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceX’s site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10’s Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX’s third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

誰敢不正常 我們就上膛

正常發揮主旨無他

就盼台灣正常 世界正常
你的盼望 我來喉舌
你的正常 我來發揮

#中天新聞 #王又正 #正常發揮

snippet.title: Myanmar sees deadly clashes despite calls for calm - BBC News
snippet.description:
Anti-coup protesters in Myanmar have been killed after troops opened fire. 

The security forces used live rounds on large crowds in Mandalay and Monywa, and at least two of the victims are believed be teenage children.

Mass protests have been taking place across the country since the military seized control on 1 February.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: 東張西望 ｜吳孟達 永遠的一代笑匠 ｜周星馳 ｜最佳拍檔 大起大跌精彩一生｜達哥 ｜他來自江湖
snippet.description:
【東張西望】永遠的一代笑匠 周星馳最佳拍檔 大起大跌精彩一生達哥吳孟達

資深藝人吳孟達離開我們，回顧佢嘅一生多姿多采，感情生活豐富。而且達哥嘅演藝作品不勝枚舉，有唔少角色令我們印象深刻！達哥由藝員訓練班出身，同期同學有周潤發同埋盧海鵬。達哥嘅著名電視作品一定不離《他來自江湖》，達哥同周星馳嘅合作大受歡迎，從此佢哋係喜劇嘅最佳拍檔。而達哥獨自係影圈亦發展不俗，係1992年有19套電影上畫，成績斐然。

#東張西望 #吳孟達 #周星馳  #三叔 #電影
會員限定內容盡在會員專區:

snippet.title: Texas's power disaster is a warning sign for the US
snippet.description:
America's power grid is not ready.

Subscribe and turn on notifications (🔔 ) so you don't miss any videos: http://goo.gl/0bsAjO

In February, extreme cold and an unusual winter storm left millions of Texans in the dark. Many went without power or water, in subzero temperatures, for nearly five days. It was a disaster; dozens died. But even though that storm hit much of the country, the power outages were mostly limited to Texas. That’s because Texas is on its own electrical grid, separate from the rest of the country, which means it can’t easily get power from other states in an emergency.

But Texas's grid itself is not what failed. Power went out across Texas in the first place because energy sources across the state were unprepared for severe weather. And that didn’t have to happen; Texas had been warned about this exact scenario, and had actually experienced versions of it twice in the last 30 years. But they didn’t prepare.

Now the rest of the US faces the same issue. Climate change is making severe weather disasters more and more frequent. And the American energy system is not ready for it.

Read more about what happened in Texas and about the US electrical grid: https://www.vox.com/22289517/texas-storm-uri-weather-power-outage-snow

And check out more coverage of the Texas power crisis from the Texas Tribune: https://www.texastribune.org/2021/02/22/texas-power-grid-extreme-weather/

Vox.com is a news website that helps you cut through the noise and understand what's really driving the events in the headlines. Check out http://www.vox.com.

snippet.title: "Everything will be okay": last message of teen killed in Myanmar protest
snippet.description:
"다 잘 될거야"...숨진 미얀마 19세 태권도 소녀의 마지막 메시지

It's time for the 'World Now'. Bringing you the latest and some of the most interesting news around the globe, I'm Choi Jeong-yoon.
Bloodshed continues in Myanmar...and one final message by a teenage victim is touching the hearts of many across the world.
A 19-year-old taekwondo champion known as Angel was killed by a shot to the head...while protesting on the streets of Mandalay.
As many pictures of her and the phrase, “Everything will be OK," on her T-shirt went viral on social media...the message soon became a symbol of defiance of the military forces.
On Thursday, hundreds of mourners in Myanmar attended her funeral.
During her open-casket ceremony, mourners sang revolutionary songs and chanted anti-coup slogans.
The military junta has not yet made any comments regarding her or over 50 other deaths since the military takeover.

#Myanmar #Protest #Victim 

📣 Arirang News(Facebook) : https://www.facebook.com/arirangtvnews
📣 Arirang News(Twitter) : https://twitter.com/arirangtvnews
📣 News Center(YouTube) : https://www.youtube.com/c/NEWSCENTER_ARIRANGTV


2021-03-05, 07:00 (KST)

snippet.title: 車文晶、車文傑來看老爹了！ 周星馳、劉德華現身靈堂送吳孟達最後一程
snippet.description:
港星吳孟達（達叔）上月27日因肝癌病逝，享壽70歲，今（7）日在紅磡世界殯儀館地下景行堂設靈，採基督教形式進行安息禮拜，隔天舉行告別式並火化。靈堂以簡潔為主，橫匾寫上「主懷安息」，遺照上的達哥身寶穿藍色西裝，左手托著下巴，露出慈祥的笑容。吳孟達生前有3段婚姻，遺照前方也擺放了現任侯珊燕與子女吳韋侖與吳楚瑜的心型花圈，以及首任妻子麥莉莉和2女凱欣、凱兒的花圈。

#吳孟達 #周星馳 #劉德華 #靈堂 #告別式 #車文晶 #車文傑

snippet.title: PENGAKUAN Kaesang Pangarep soal Batal Nikahi Felicia Tissue, Ungkap Alasan Tak Umbar ke Publik
snippet.description:
TRIBUN-VIDEO.COM - Hubungan asmaranya empat menjadi perbincangan publik, Kaesang Pangarep akhirnya buka suara.

Kaesang disebut meninggalkan kekasihnya Felicia Tissue lantaran ada orang lain.

Kini Kaesang mengaku sudah memutuskan hubungan dengan Felicia sejak Januari 2021.

Ia menjelaskan, sebenarnya ia sudah berbicara kepada Felicia untuk mengakhiri hubungan asmaranya pada Januari lalu.

Bahkan saat mengutarakan maksud untuk mengakhiri hubungan, Kaesang menyebut sempat dimaki-maki.

Meski begitu, menurut Kaesang hubungan asmaranya merupakan masalah pribadi dan tidak etis untuk diumbar.

"Itu kan masalh pribadi toh, masalah pribadi ngapain toh diumbar umbar engga etis," kata Kaesang.

Sebelumnya, Putera Presiden Jokowi, Kaesang Pangarep tengah diterpa gosip hubungan asmara.

Dikutip dari video yang diterima oleh Tribunnews.com, Senin (8/3/2021), Kaesang disebut meninggalkan kekasihnya, Felicia Tissue, karena adanya wanita lain.

Bahkan ibunda  Felicia Tissue, Meilia Lau melalui akun instagramnya @meilia_lau mengungkapkan Kaesang yang berjanji akan menikahi anaknya.

Tulisan Meilia tersebut turut me-mention akun instagram Jokowi, @jokowi dan kemudian viral di jagat twitter.

Sementara itu, Tenaga Ahli Utama Kantor Staf Kepresidenan Ali Mochtar Ngabalin meminta hubungan Kaesang dan Felicia tak perlu menyeret orangtua.

"Inilah, jangan bawa-bawa orang-tua, jangan dipaksa-paksa," kata Ali.

Menurut Ali, hubungan asmara seorang anak, biar anaklah yang menentukan lantaran mereka yang menjalaninya.

Orangtua cukup mengarahkan, tanpa perlu ikut campur.

Terlebih bila mengaitkannya dengan presiden.

Meskipun Presiden tidak terganggu, namun menurutnya kurang elok bila membawa-bawa nama Presiden.

(Tribun-Video.com)

snippet.title: Oprah Winfrey on her bombshell Harry and Meghan interview
snippet.description:
Oprah Winfrey joined "CBS This Morning" the day after her wide-ranging interview with Prince Harry and Meghan, Duchess of Sussex aired on CBS. Winfrey is reacting to some of the most explosive moments of the interview, and what she learned from the couple.

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: 【ENG SUB】[创造营 CHUANG2021] EP02 | First Class A! Performance Assignment Releases 首个A班诞生！公演任务发布~
snippet.description:
CHUANG 2021, produced by Tencent Video, is a variety show of an international boy group formation. It is dedicated to fully showing the stage performance, vigour and persistence of youngsters of new times. Nearly a hundred boys from various countries, agencies and colleges, with the help of outstanding seniors, will be together to make cultural and professional exchanges, improve themselves by rising to the challenge, explore their true self and chase their dreams zealously.

《创造营2021》是由腾讯视频出品的国际青年文化交流男团成长综艺，致力于充分展现新时代国际青年人的音乐舞台表现力、青春活力和拼搏向上力。节目召集来自不同国家、不同经纪公司和院校的近百名学员，在多位榜样前辈的引领、助力、陪伴下一同进行文化与专业交流、打破重组迎接挑战，一同探索真我热血追梦。

☞Subscribe our Channel NOW: http://bit.ly/CHUANG2021

snippet.title: EP24 预告 Trailer 众人以为十一娘怀孕，侯爷抱十一娘竟说能帮她生孩子【锦心似玉 The Sword and The Brocade】
snippet.description:
▶02月28日首播，每周三四五晚20点更新两集
▶主演：  钟汉良、谭松韵、何泓姗、唐晓天
☞立即观看全集☞http://bit.ly/37B7eE7

《锦心似玉》明朝年间，庶女罗十一娘虽地位卑微却极有主见，认为女子眼光不应局限于内宅格局，她希望能凭靠精湛的刺绣技艺争取所向往的自由人生。意外嫁给永平侯大将军徐令宜后，她用乐观积极的心态对待身边的每一个人，依靠努力收获徐家上下的信任，重新执掌中馈。徐令宜被十一娘的种种美好品性而吸引，继而为之动心。两人几经周折情愫暗生，先婚后爱相知相许。在丈夫的支持下，十一娘开绣坊仙绫阁，努力传承刺绣技艺。而永平侯徐令宜，为维护家国安宁，改善民生，力挺开放海禁，经历重重困难。在徐家面临抄家灭族的滔天巨祸之时，夫妻齐心合力化解危局，成功护徐氏一族周全，最终促成开放海禁，至此海上贸易繁荣昌盛，沿海百姓安居乐业。夫妻二人情投意合，相信彼此，坚持所爱，一起面对人生风雨，书写了属于他们的传奇人生。

snippet.title: 【正常發揮PiMW 】20210304 「執政末日」敗象已現!民進黨「黔驢技窮」...「救命稻草」竟是韓國瑜?
snippet.description:
正常發揮 是個{不正常}的政論節目

我們評論政治 更愛挖掘內幕
我們監督時政 更愛嘲弄政客

我們罵人不帶髒 糗人沒在怕

犀利也好 幽默也罷
難搞也行 有種最大

我們的苛薄不太正常
我們的尖酸直戳心臟 

國內 國外 政治 社會

誰敢不正常 我們就上膛

正常發揮主旨無他

就盼台灣正常 世界正常
你的盼望 我來喉舌
你的正常 我來發揮

#王又正 #正常發揮

snippet.title: 「猪的一身」—来看看我们施甸人是怎么花样吃猪的？【滇西小哥】
snippet.description:
我们每年家里都会宰一头年猪，祖辈们为了在云南的特殊环境下储存猪肉，把猪身上每个部位都用不同的方式加工，一头猪能吃上一整年……过去三年，我把猪每个部位的腌制方法都拍过一遍了……这次用三年的素材来个大合集！帮大家回顾一下我们施甸人的花样吃猪~

※Click "cc" on the lower right menu to choose your subtitle language.

Each year, we will enjoy an annual pig with the whole family. In order to preserve pork longer here in Yunnan, our ancestors have developed various ways to store different parts of the pig. As a result, a pig can be preserved and enjoyed for the whole year. In the past three years, I've shot videos about every method to preserve every part of a pig. Now it's time for a compilation! Let's take a look at how we Shidian people enjoy pork in various ways!

大家好！我是滇西小哥，一个地道的云南妹子，如果你喜欢我的视频，请持续关注我的频道，
我会在不同的平台分享我的生活，以及云南特色美食，祝你们天天开心，每天都有美食相伴～

hi.title: 「सुअर का पूरा शरीर」– आप देखिए कि हम शिदियन लोग कैसे खाते हैं?
hi.description:
※नीचे दाऐ कोना मेनू बार में सीसी बटन पर क्लिक करें, तो संबंधित भाषा में उपशीर्षक दिखाई होगी। 

हम हर साल घर पर एक नए साल के सुअर का वध करते हैं। युन्नान के विशेष वातावरण में पोर्क को स्टोर करने के लिए पूर्वज सुअर के प्रत्येक भाग को अलग-अलग तरीके से संसाधित करते हैं, और एक सुअर पूरे साल तक खा सकते है ... पिछले तीन वर्षों में, मैंने सुअर के हर हिस्से की मैरिटिंग विधियों का वीडियो बनाया है। इस बार तीन साल की सामग्री का उपयोग करके एक बड़ा संग्रह बनाया गया, सूअर खाने के लिए हमारे शिदियन लोगों की विभिन्न तरीकों की समीक्षा करने में सभी की मदद करने के लिए ~

सभी को नमस्कार, मैं दिअन षि षीओग, युन्नान की एक असली छोटी बहन। अगर आपको मेरा वीडियो पसंद है तो मेरे चैनल को देखना जारी रखें। मैं विभिन्न प्लेटफार्मों पर अपने जीवन और युन्नान विशिष्टताओं को साझा करूं, मुझे ख्वाइश है कि आप हर दिन खुश रहें स्वादिष्ट भोजन के साथ ~

en.title: 「Everything a Pig Has」- Come and See how Shidian People Enjoy Pork in Various Ways
en.description:
※Click "cc" on the lower right menu to choose your subtitle language.

Each year, we will enjoy an annual pig with the whole family. In order to preserve pork longer here in Yunnan, our ancestors have developed various ways to store different parts of the pig. As a result, a pig can be preserved and enjoyed for the whole year. In the past three years, I've shot videos about every method to preserve every part of a pig. Now it's time for a compilation! Let's take a look at how we Shidian people enjoy pork in various ways!

Hello, everyone! I am Dianxi Xiaoge, a Yunnan native. If you enjoy my videos, please keep subscribing to my channel.
I'll continue to share my life and Yunnan-sytled food in my uploads. Wish you have a happy life and enjoy tasty food every day.

th.title: เรื่องของหมู - ชาวซือเตี้ยนกับหลากหลายวิธีในการเพลิดเพลินกับอาหารจากเนื้อหมู -มีอะไรบ้าง?
th.description:
※คลิกปุ่ม "คำบรรยาย" ที่แถบเมนูด้านล่างขวาเพื่อเลือกแสดงซับไตเติ้ลภาษาไทย

ทุก ๆ ปีครอบครัวเราจะมีวันชำแหละหมู
และมีการ - 'กินเลี้ยงหมูประจำปี' ,
ด้วยสภาพแวดล้อมและภูมิอากาศที่พิเศษของยูนนาน, 
บรรพบุรุษของเราจึงได้พัฒนาภูมิปัญญา
ในการถนอมอาหารจากส่วนต่าง ๆ ของเนื้อหมู 
ทำให้สามารถมีเนื้อหมูไว้กินได้ตลอดทั้งปี 
ในช่วงสามปีที่ผ่านมา,
ฉันได้ถ่ายวิดีโอเกี่ยวกับการถนอมอาหารจากเนื้อหมูมาแล้วหลายตอน
วันนี้จึงได้รวบรวมมาให้ย้อนดูกันว่า
ชาวเมืองซือเตี้ยนเพลิดเพลินกับอาหารจากเนื้อหมู
ในวิธีการที่หลากหลายได้อย่างไรบ้าง ?
  ~ ไปดูกันเลยค่ะ ! ~

สวัสดีค่ะ เพื่อน ๆ ทุกคน !
ฉันคือเตียนซี เสี่ยวเกอ (Dianxi Xiaoge-滇西小哥)
เป็นสาวชาวพื้นเมืองจากมณฑลยูนนาน ประเทศจีน
หากคุณชื่นชอบวิดีโอนี้กรุณากด "ติดตาม" ช่องของฉันด้วยค่ะ
ฉันจะได้นำเสนอเรื่องราวของฉันและอาหารตามแบบฉบับของยูนนาน มาแบ่งปันต่อไป
ขอให้คุณมีความสุขและเพลิดเพลินกับอาหารอร่อยทุก ๆ วันด้วยค่ะ

bn.title: 「শূকরের সমগ্র ভাগ」- আমরা কিভাবে শূকরের মাংস রান্না করি তা একবার দেখে নিন?
bn.description:
※মেনু বারের নীচের ডানদিকে কোণার সিসি বোতামটি ক্লিক করুন এবং সংশ্লিষ্ট ভাষায় সাবটাইটেল উপস্থিত হবে!

প্রতি বছর আমরা একটা আস্ত শূকর রান্না করি, পর্কটিকে ইউনানের বিশেষ স্থিতিতে সংরক্ষণ করা হয়, পূর্বপুরুষেরা শূকরের বিভিন্ন অংশকে আলাদা উপায়ে প্রক্রিয়াজাত করেছে। তাইজন্য একটা সম্পূর্ণ শূকরকে শেষ করতে প্রায় এক বছর লেগে যায়… আমি শূকরের প্রতিটি ভাগের সংরক্ষণের জন্য আলাদা করে ভিডিও করেছি… এখানে আমি বিগত 3 বছরের জিনিসপত্রের ওপর ভিত্তি করে একটা কালেকশান বের করব!চলো শিডিয়ানে বিভিন্ন উপায়ে বিশেষ রকমের শূকর রান্না দেখাই~

সবাইকে অভিবাদন! আমি ডায়ানজি জিয়াওজে, ইউনান প্রদেশের স্থানীয় এক মেয়ে, আপনি যদি আমার ভিডিও পছন্দ করেন তবে দয়া করে আমার চ্যানেলটি অনুসরণ করুন, আমি ইউনান্নে আমার জীবন এবং বিশেষ খাবারগুলি বিভিন্ন প্ল্যাটফর্মে শেয়ার করব, আমি আপনাকে প্রতিদিন সুখী করতে চাই এবং প্রতিদিন সুস্বাদু খাবার খাওয়া~

id.title: 「Satu ekor babi」– Mari saksikan bagaimana variasi cara kami orang Shidian memakan babi?
id.description:
※Tekan tombol pada menu di kanan bawah, maka akan muncul subtitle dengan bahasa yang sesuai!

Di keluarga kami setiap tahun selalu memotong seekor babi. Demi menyimpan daging babi dalam lingkungan yang khusus di Yunnan, para leluhur kami mengolah setiap bagian tubuh babi. Seekor babi pun bisa dimakan hingga sepanjang tahun.... Tiga tahun lalu, aku telah mensyuting cara memarinasi setiap bagian tubuh babi.... Kali ini aku akan menggunakan materi dalam tiga tahun ini dan merangkumnya! Ini untuk membantu kalian semua menyimak kembali variasi cara orang Shidian memakan babi.

Halo semuanya. Aku adalah Dianxi Xiaoge, seorang gadis khas Yunnan. Jika kalian menyukai videoku, silakan terus ikuti saluranku ini. Aku akan berbagi kehidupanku dan makanan lezat khas Yunnan di platform yang berbeda. Semoga kalian setiap hari berbahagia, dan setiap hari selalu ditemani makanan lezat~

vi.title: 「Cả con lợn」– đến xem xem người Thi Điện chúng tôi có các kiểu ăn thịt lợn như thế nào?
vi.description:
※click chuột nhấn vào cc ở góc dưới bên phải màn hình, thì sẽ có bản sub tương ứng với ngôn ngữ của bạn xuất hiện rồi !

Mỗi năm nhà chúng tôi đều sẽ giết thịt một con lợn tết, ông bà tổ tiên dựa vào sự đặc biệt của môi trường để tích trữ thịt lợn, mỗi một bộ phận trên người con lợn đều dùng các phương thức gia công khác nhau, một con lợn có thể ăn được cả năm... đã qua ba năm rồi, tất cả những phương pháp tẩm ướp từng bộ phận của con lợn đều đã được tôi quay lại hết... lần này dùng nguyên liệu của ba năm để kết hợp! Để cho các bạn hồi tưởng một chút về các cách ăn thịt lợn của người Thi Điện chúng tôi.

Chào các bạn! Tôi là Điền Tây tiểu ca, một cô gái  chính hiệu của tỉnh Vân Nam, nếu như các bạn thích video của tôi, có thể tiếp tục theo dõi trang của tôi, tôi sẽ chia sẻ cuộc sống của tôi ở các  trang,  và các món ăn đặc sắc của Vân Nam, chúc các bạn luôn luôn vui vẻ, ngày nào cũng có ẩm thực bầu bạn~

ko.title: 「돼지 한마리」—시뎬인은 어떻게 돼지를 먹는지 보시겠어요?
ko.description:
※우측 상단 메뉴의 cc버튼을 클릭하시면 원하시는 언어의 자막이 나옵니다!

저희집은 해마다 돼지를 한마리씩 잡습니다. 조상들은 운남의 독특한 환경에서 돼지고기를 저장하기 위해서. 돼지의 모든 부위를 각기 다른 방식으로 가공을 한답니다. 돼지 한마리를 한 해동안 먹을 수 있지요. 지난 3년간, 돼지의 모든 부위의 절임 방식을 한번씩 찍었었습니다. 이번에는 3년간 찍은 내용들로 영상을 만들어봤습니다! 여러분들에게 저희 시뎬사람들이 어떻게 돼지를 먹는지 다시한번 소개해드리겠습니다~

여러분 안녕하세요! 저는 전서소가(뎬시샤오꺼) 운남 본토 아가씨 입니다. 제 영상이 마음에 드신다면 계속해서 제 채널을 구독해주세요.
저는 몇가지 플랫폼에서 제 일상과 운남 특색 미식들을 공유하고있습니다. 여러분 좋은하루되시고 매일 맛있는 음식과 함께하시길 바라겠습니다~

snippet.title: မကြယ်စင်ဂူကိုဖောက်တဲ့ ခြေရာ၊ လက်ရာတွေ ချန်ခဲ့
snippet.description: မကြယ်စင်ရဲ့ ရုပ်အလောင်းသင်္ဂြိုဟ်ခဲ့ရာ  အေးရိပ်ငြိမ်သင်္ချိုင်းထဲမှာ စစ်တပ်နဲ့ရဲလုံခြုံရေးယူထားပြီး  ၃ နာရီကျော်ကြာ ဘာတွေလုပ်ခဲ့တယ်ဆိုတာကို စောင့်ကြည့်နေခဲ့တဲ့ သင်္ချိုင်းဝန်ထမ်းက အခုလို ရှင်းပြထားပါတယ်။

snippet.title: 【正常發揮PiMW】20210302「造反有理」! 惡搞鳳梨! 踐踏藻礁! 最「鐵」的年輕人都不挺小英了…
snippet.description:
正常發揮 是個{不正常}的政論節目

我們評論政治 更愛挖掘內幕
我們監督時政 更愛嘲弄政客

我們罵人不帶髒 糗人沒在怕

犀利也好 幽默也罷
難搞也行 有種最大

我們的苛薄不太正常
我們的尖酸直戳心臟 

國內 國外 政治 社會

誰敢不正常 我們就上膛

正常發揮主旨無他

就盼台灣正常 世界正常
你的盼望 我來喉舌
你的正常 我來發揮

#王又正 #正常發揮

⚠️「未經著作權人事先書面同意，勿將內容用於商業性質之分享、連結。」
「如有任何營業使用，必須事先取得書面同意」

⚠️ 重要提醒！目前YT頻道、臉書粉專先上線！不定時會分享正常發揮小組的工作內容、生活點滴。

snippet.title: YOASOBI - 群青  / THE FIRST TAKE
snippet.description:
「THE FIRST TAKE」は、一発撮りのパフォーマンスを鮮明に切り取るYouTubeチャンネル。
ONE TAKE ONLY, ONE LIFE ONLY. 一発撮りで、音楽と向き合う。

第96回は、「THE HOME TAKE」で「夜に駆ける」を披露し話題となったYOASOBIが、Ayase・ikuraの2人揃って初登場。
今回は、人気マンガ『ブルーピリオド』（作・山口つばさ）にインスパイアされて生まれ、ブルボン「アルフォートミニチョコレート」TVCMでもおなじみの人気曲「群青」をメディア初歌唱する。
楽曲の中でも印象的な合唱パートにぷらそにかのメンバーを迎え、バンドメンバーと共に圧巻のパフォーマンスを一発撮りで披露する。

STREAMING&DOWNLOAD：https://orcd.co/gunjo

Guitar：AssH
Bass：やまもとひかる
Drums：仄雲
Keyboards：禊萩ざくろ
Chorus：ぷらそにか

■YOASOBI SNS
Official Site：https://www.yoasobi-music.jp/
Twitter：https://twitter.com/yoasobi_staff
ikura Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/lilasikuta/
Ayase Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/ayase_0404/
YouTube：https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvpredjG93ifbCP1Y77JyFA

■「THE FIRST TAKE」SNS 
Official site：https://www.thefirsttake.jp/
Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/the_firsttake/
Twitter：https://twitter.com/The_FirstTake   
Tiktok：https://www.tiktok.com/@the_first_take

—  

白いスタジオに置かれた一本のマイク。

ここでのルールはただ一つ。
一発撮りのパフォーマンスをすること。
それ以外は、何をしてもいい。

一度きりのテイクで、何をみせてくれるだろうか。

一発撮りで、音楽と向き合う。
THE FIRST TAKE


A microphone and a white studio.

And 1 rule.
You’ve got 1 TAKE.
Perform anything you like.

Show us everything you’ve got for that 1 moment.

ONE TAKE ONLY, ONE LIFE ONLY.
THE FIRST TAKE


YOASOBI returns from THE HOME TAKE in our episode 96. The first time to have both Ayase and ikura to appear at THE FIRST TAKE.
1 TAKE performance of “Gunjo”, a song inspired by a smash-hit anime Blue Period and has a tie-in to Bourbon Alfort Mini Chocolate TV commercial, for the first time on a media.
Welcoming PLUSONICA as the chorus and with the band members, performs a mind blowing performance for THE FIRST TAKE.



CREDITS  

—   

Creative Director / Art Director: Keisuke Shimizu 
Art Director: Kana Takarada 
Copywriter: Hiroshi Yamazaki 
Director of Photography: Kazuki Nagayama 
Lighting Director: Kazuhide Toya 
Producer: Kentaro Kinoshita
Stylist: Daisuke Fujimoto
Hair&Make: YOUCA
tags: ずっと真夜中でいいのに

snippet.title: Actor Terence Cao charged with breaching Covid-19 laws
snippet.description:
Mediacorp actor Terence Cao was charged on Tuesday (March 2) with flouting Covid-19 safe distancing rules over a birthday party held at his condominium unit last October.

He is seen here leaving the State Courts on Tuesday (March 2). 

Read more: https://tdy.sg/2NTQ127

snippet.title: 賽馬直播｜2021-03-03 競馬Fact Check Live直播九場HKJC香港賽馬會快活谷草地夜馬 即場貼士 AI模擬賽果 排隊馬 | 蘋果日報 Apple Daily
snippet.description:
周三（3日）跑馬地馬場上演九場賽事，頭場定於傍晚6時45分開跑。

蘋果《競馬Fact Check》屆時直播各場賽事，讓馬迷猶如置身場內睇跑馬。

巴西籍騎師馬雅剛戰登場冇馬贏，不過適逢另一同鄉莫雷拉停賽，今次谷草地標戰「夫卜」上陣，支持度極高，主持分析此路人馬各駒機會，配合各場馬匹賽績、體重變化、人馬合作等統計資料，一表睇晒，方便刨馬。

《競馬Fact Check》今季新增AI模擬賽果，集各項data進行運算，識別出哪些是機會馬，以得分高低排序，一目了然！



蘋果日報 ： http://hk.apple.nextmedia.com
即 like 蘋果 fb  ： http://www.facebook.com/hk.nextmedia
iPhone App ： http://bit.ly/AppleDailyApp-iPhone
Android App ： http://bit.ly/AppleDailyApp-Android
=======

蘋果《競馬Fact Check》屆時直播各場賽事，讓馬迷猶如置身場內睇跑馬。

巴西籍騎師馬雅剛戰登場冇馬贏，不過適逢另一同鄉莫雷拉停賽，今次谷草地標戰「夫卜」上陣，支持度極高，主持分析此路人馬各駒機會，配合各場馬匹賽績、體重變化、人馬合作等統計資料，一表睇晒，方便刨馬。

Enjoy my anime Video Every Month? Consider Supporting on Patreon 😀

Eren successfully destroys his friendship calling Mikasa a slave and beating up Armin

Eren uses WarHammer Titan to break out of jail!
Can Eren and Zeke Yeager lead Elida to victory? 

#AOT
#AOT138
#Foxen

The Beast Titan, Zeke Jaeger and the Survey Corps are officially working together to free the Eldians on Paradis Island and within Marley.
The Female Titan Annie is back . . . Annie Leonhardt is still in crystal mode

The Beast Titan aka Zeke Jaeger official confirmed to be working with the Survey Corps's Levi Ackerman and with his brother Eren Jaeger.

The WarHammer titan dies! Eren has eaten the WarHammer Titan!
What does this mean for the Attack on Titan going forward? 



Complete Attack on Titan Great Titan War History & Truth
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PjAHk...

Eren's Attack Titan fights against the WarHammer Titan aka Willy's Sister. Mikasa, Jean and the scouts show up to take it down.

The current Marley Arc is ongoing for Shingeki no Kyojin. Where are Eren Jaeger, Mikasa Ackerman, Armin Alert, and Levi Ackerman?
They’re nowhere to be seen after the 4 year time skip.
The Marley Arc has focused on the Beast Titan, aka Zeke Jaeger, Reiner, and the new Marley trainees: 

Attack on Titan focuses on the story of Armin Arlert, Mikasa Ackerman, and Eren Jaeger battling against the mighty Titans of their world.

The story begins in 845 after the fall of Wall Maria and Titans started eating humans within the Shiganshina District. This pushed humanity back behind the second Wall, Wall Rose. Only Wall Rose and Wall Sina were left to stop the Titans.

snippet.title: Myanmar Update: Trade Union arm up pressure on the Military Junta| Military Coup | World News | WION
snippet.description:
Myanmar's major trade unions called on members to shut down the economy from Monday to support a campaign against last month's coup, turning up the pressure on the junta.

#Myanmar #TradeUnion #MilitaryJunta

About Channel: 

WION -The World is One News, examines global issues with in-depth analysis. We provide much more than the news of the day. Our aim to empower people to explore their world. snippet.title: What will break the stalemate in Myanmar?  | Inside Story
snippet.description:
A month of protests against Myanmar's military coup shows no signs of letting up.
The army has begun firing live rounds at peaceful demonstrators.
The UN says scores of people have been killed since February 1.
Despite this, the protests are growing larger in many towns and cities.
With neither side backing down, can anything break the impasse?

snippet.description:
案件|養女與養父發生不倫之戀，並無情地殘害養母！改過自新的問題少女為何重返不歸路？【詭靈藝案件調查局】
大家好，妮妮今天帶來的案件發生在美國俄亥俄州。
塞佈麗娜出生於1994年，她的生父是一個偏執的精神分裂病患，生母也因為使用違禁品多次入獄。雖然祖母終於成為了塞佈麗娜的監護人，但在父母的影響下，塞佈麗娜很小時就被確認患有多種精神疾病。
隨著年紀的增長，她越發叛逆，成績不好也不合群，漸漸成為了一個問題少女。祖母只好尋求政府機構的幫助。從此塞佈麗娜先後去了多個寄養家庭，但由於她的劣跡斑斑，沒有一個家庭願意接納她。
事情的轉機發生在2011年七月，麗莎和馬克成為了塞佈麗娜新的養父母，他們對她十分友善，他們的兩個女兒也和她相處融洽。塞佈麗娜不再翹課也不再鬧事，她的生活正在向新的篇章邁進。
但誰也想不到，2012年11月16日，曾經美好的一切都被摧毀。塞佈麗娜犯下了她人生中最大的一個錯誤...

snippet.title: Myanmar sees bloodliest day as 38 protesters killed
snippet.description:
유엔 미얀마특사 "38명 사망…가장 많은 피를 흘린 날"

Our top story this morning, at least 38 people were killed on Wednesday in Myanmar,... marking the bloodiest day since protests against the military coup began last month.
The protesters were killed as security forces opened fire on large crowds in a number of cities.
Lee Seung-jae reports.
Describing Wednesday as the "bloodiest day" since the military coup began,... the UN's envoy to Myanmar said at least 38 protesters were killed in the country.
"Today was the bloodiest day since the coup happened on the 1st of February. We had today, only today, 38 people died. We have now more than over 50 people died since the coup started and many are wounded."
Despite growing international condemnation,.. the military is continuing to escalate its response to the protests.
According to Reuters,... security forces opened fire in several towns and cities with little warning.
At least two of Wednesday's victims were said to have been teenagers.
Videos also showed security forces firing slingshots at protesters,... and even brutally beating an ambulance crew.
Police have also fired tear gas and rubber bullets to disperse crowds.
Over a thousand protesters are also known to have been detained and their whereabouts remain unknown.
"All together we have around 1,200 people are now detained and many families don't know where their members of the families are detained, if they are healthy or not. So how can we watch this situation longer?"
While the military's escalation has led to increased diplomatic efforts to resolve the crisis,... so far countries have only imposed sanctions on military officials.
However,... watchers say Wednesday's events could trigger a turning point in the dynamic.
Lee Seung-jae, Arirang News.

#Myanmar #Protest #Coup

📣 Arirang News(Facebook) : https://www.facebook.com/arirangtvnews
📣 Arirang News(Twitter) : https://twitter.com/arirangtvnews
📣 News Center(YouTube) : https://www.youtube.com/c/NEWSCENTER_ARIRANGTV


2021-03-04, 07:00 (KST)

snippet.title: Prince Harry Reveals Prince Charles Stopped Taking His Calls Amid ‘Megxit’
snippet.description:
Prince Harry admits that his father Prince Charles stopped taking his calls when he revealed his plans to step down from royal duties with his wife Meghan Markle. The revelation came during Sunday’s ‘Oprah With Meghan and Harry: A CBS Primetime Special.’ The Duke of Sussex said he believes this came after he took matters into his own hands following Meghan’s increasing distress that led to their royal exit.

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover’s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

《乘风破浪的姐姐》是芒果TV推出的女团成长综艺节目，与其他女团选秀不同，该节目召集了30位1990年之前出生的女艺人，并最终选出7位成员组成女团。在第二季节目中，大众评审按照年龄分为30+和30-两大阵营。赛制上也变得更加残酷，初舞台表演要有Vocal（唱）和Dance（跳）两项，两项分开表演且缺一不可。节目焦点从女性的精彩绽放渗透到她们成功背后付出的努力和奋斗，表现出丰富多样化的女性价值观，诠释自信奋斗的“她力量”，让更多女性能从中感受到自我价值的体现。

snippet.title: 🔴 [Watch in HD] ONE Championship: FISTS OF FURY II
snippet.description:
ONE Championship is back with another night of martial arts actions on Friday, 5 March, as ONE: FISTS OF FURY II airs right here on YouTube at 8:30 p.m. Singapore time (some regions excluded).

In the main event, Iranian superstar Amir Aliakbari makes his highly-anticipated ONE Championship debut against South Korean knockout artist Kang Ji Won!

They are joined on this electrifying card by Brazilian powerhouse Alexandre Machado, undefeated Russian juggernaut Anatoly Malykhin, Japanese warrior Ryogo Takahashi, Chinese slugger Tang Kai, and more! 

Check out the full card below, and make sure you tune in!

Heavyweight Mixed Martial Arts
Amir Aliakbari vs. Kang Ji Won

Heavyweight Mixed Martial Arts
Alexandre Machado vs. Anatoly Malykhin

Featherweight Mixed Martial Arts
Ryogo Takahashi vs. Tang Kai

Featherweight Mixed Martial Arts
Yoshiki Nakahara vs. Ruslan Emilbek Uulu

Bantamweight Muay Thai
Han Zi Hao vs. Adam Noi

Bantamweight Mixed Martial Arts
Mark Fairtex Abelardo vs. Emilio Urrutia

#ONEFistsOfFury2 #ONEChampionship

snippet.title: Grab Your Tissues! Ronda Felton Makes Lionel Richie Cry! - American Idol 2021
snippet.description:
Ronda Felton has faced some challenging times throughout her life, but nothing has taken away from her kind, loving spirit. Ronda absolutely blows the judges away with her rendition of “One Night Only” by Jennifer Hudson, as Lionel is moved to tears by Ronda’s performance. Katy Perry tells Ronda: “You don't have to be strong. You just have to be Ronda and that will take you all the way." We’re beyond excited to see what Ronda has in store for Hollywood Week!

See more of American Idol 2021 on our official site: http://www.americanidol.com
Like American Idol on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AmericanIdol
Follow American Idol on Twitter: https://twitter.com/americanidol
Follow American Idol on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/americanidol/

AMERICAN IDOL, the iconic series that revolutionized the television landscape by pioneering the music competition genre, returns on ABC.

American Idol 2021

Helping to determine who America will ultimately vote for to become the next singing sensation are music industry forces and superstar judges Luke Bryan, Katy Perry and Lionel Richie. Emmy® Award-winning host and producer Ryan Seacrest continues as host of the beloved series, while multimedia personality Bobby Bones serves as the in-house mentor.
